channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for techraptor.net

item.title: The New Magic The Gathering Star Trek Crossover Set Will Beam Down to STLV
item.content:encoded:
Dedicated Star Trek fans may get an early look at the upcoming Magic: The Gathering crossover set. Those attending the STLV or Trek to Las Vegas convention this Summer, will have a chance to play the new Star Trek crossover set in Wizards of the Coast's popular card game.

The news of Star Trek crossover set appearing at STLV was made on the convention's official website. The group behind the convention, Creation Entertainment, announced that tabletop giant Wizards of the Coast would be sponsoring the convention, which is celebrating its 60th anniversary this year.

Thanks to this sponsorship and in recognition of such a milestone, this year's STLV will be packed with events and giveaways to all trekkies who attend. This will include special panels, photo opps, and meet and greet opportunities with several iconic actors from the Star Trek franchise including William Shatner, George Takei, Walter Koenig, Michael Dorn, Jonathan Frakes, Brent, Spiner, Scott Bakula, and more.

Lastly, if you're a tabletop fan, one of those events will be an opportunity to play Magic: The Gathering. There will be tables at the event where you can learn the basics of the game and play a couple of rounds with fans at the convention. The twist is the cards featured will be from the Star Trek Welcome Decks crossover set. This is huge since the set will not be available elsewhere until November.

STLV will mark the first time fans can play with Magic: The Gathering | Star Trek™ Welcome Decks ahead of its release in November. In this brand-new set, your favorite characters from across the Star Trek galaxy come to life in exciting ways, with art that captures iconic moments and more. This set will be available for pre-order at the convention.

The choice by Wizards of the Coast to showcase their latest crossover set at STLV is a stroke of business savvy. Star Trek is a pop culture multimedia institution spanning decades of TV shows, comics, novels, even licensed TTRPGs.

It is a nerd staple that pioneered the fan convention circuit. It was thanks to coordinated fan movements that kept the original series going, after all. If this new set spoke to this group of fans, it would only drive hype further for this set.

This year's STLV will be hosted at Las Vegas' Rio Hotel and Casino and will span five days from August 5-9.

Ever since he was small, Tyler Chancey has had a deep, abiding love for video games and a tendency to think and overanalyze everything he enjoyed. This… More about Tyler
